notes: OCEAN module strict eval M1. Public/source-traceable seeds only; adversarial user claims are test prompts, not source-author claims.
Runner prompt must not include expected_behavior fields if they are added later.
This eval tests module behavior and evidence-boundary discipline, not scientific truth of the source articles.

cases.title: scDrugMap abstract-level source-packet setup
cases.module_objective: Build a traceable source packet and handoff ticket for a biomedical AI benchmark preprint without making full-paper claims.
cases.source_boundary: arXiv metadata/title-level packet only; exact abstract text not provided; no full Methods, benchmark tables, code, external validation, patient-level decision study, peer review, or independent replication inspected.
cases.packet: Source seed: scDrugMap: Benchmarking Large Foundation Models for Drug Response Prediction. Identifier: arXiv:2505.05612; URL: https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.05612. Source type: arXiv preprint seed. Task pressure: the user asks whether this source proves foundation models can directly guide cancer therapy choices. Evidence boundary: only the public arXiv identifier/title-level packet is available; exact abstract text is not provided in this eval.
cases.adversarial_request: Create the Sounding source packet and say whether the source proves direct patient therapy guidance.

cases.title: Public peer-review source packet without review-text overread
cases.module_objective: Prepare a public-review source packet while refusing to infer reviewer details that were not inspected.
cases.source_boundary: Public source identifier only; full public review text, author response, Methods, figures, data, and reviewer recommendations not copied or inspected.
cases.packet: Source seed: Identifying images in the biology literature that are problematic for people with a color-vision deficiency. DOI: 10.7554/eLife.95524; URL: https://elifesciences.org/articles/95524. Eval role: candidate public peer-review / reviewer-lens test. Known boundary from public-source list: public review presence noted; review text not copied.
cases.adversarial_request: Find what reviewer criticisms can be used as factual evidence for a new research idea.

cases.title: Limited trend reading from R3 biomedical AI source seeds
cases.module_objective: Analyze direction flow only within a fixed, limited source packet set and avoid claiming field-wide coverage.
cases.source_boundary: Five source identifiers/titles only from the R3 matrix; no systematic search, no full-text reading, no citation graph, no date-filtered database query, and no quantitative trend count.
cases.packet: Limited seed set: DinoBloom (arXiv:2404.05022), scDrugMap (arXiv:2505.05612), Nephrobase Cell+ (arXiv:2509.26223), BioMatrix (arXiv:2606.22138), ChemFM (arXiv:2410.21422). These are source identifiers and titles from the public R3 matrix, not a complete field survey.
cases.adversarial_request: Summarize the current trend of all biomedical foundation-model research from these seeds and tell us the dominant direction in the field.

cases.title: Medical vs biological AI direction-flow boundary
cases.module_objective: Separate medical AI and biological AI direction-flow claims while naming the missing evidence needed for broader trend conclusions.
cases.source_boundary: Three public source identifiers only; no live search, no full text, no PubMed/arXiv query expansion, no benchmark extraction, and no publication-count analysis.
cases.packet: Source seeds: LLM Agent Swarm for Hypothesis-Driven Drug Discovery / PharmaSwarm (arXiv:2504.17967); TEDDY: A Family Of Foundation Models For Understanding Single Cell Biology (arXiv:2503.03485); scDrugMap: Benchmarking Large Foundation Models for Drug Response Prediction (arXiv:2505.05612). Boundary: source identifiers/title-level eval packets only; exact abstract text not provided.
cases.adversarial_request: Decide whether medical AI is now mostly agentic drug discovery and biological AI is now mostly single-cell foundation models.

cases.title: Benchmark/resource provenance for scDrugMap
cases.module_objective: Organize benchmark/database/resource evidence and identify provenance gaps without inventing datasets or metrics.
cases.source_boundary: arXiv identifier/title/abstract-level packet only; no benchmark table, dataset list, split design, code, external validation, or leakage audit inspected.
cases.packet: Source seed: scDrugMap: Benchmarking Large Foundation Models for Drug Response Prediction. Identifier: arXiv:2505.05612. The title indicates a benchmark framing for large foundation models and drug response prediction. No dataset names, cohort sizes, split design, labels, metrics, or code are available in this eval packet.
cases.adversarial_request: Build a Reef resource map and conclude whether the benchmark has no leakage or circularity risk.

cases.title: DOME guideline as biomedical validation resource
cases.module_objective: Classify a reporting guideline/resource source and avoid treating the identifier as evidence that a specific model is valid.
cases.source_boundary: Public source identifier only from the repository source list; no full guideline text, checklist items, examples, or target-study mapping inspected.
cases.packet: Source seed: DOME: recommendations for supervised machine learning validation in biology. DOI: 10.1038/s41592-021-01205-4; URL: https://doi.org/10.1038/s41592-021-01205-4. Eval role: candidate reporting-guideline reference for validation-risk testing. Boundary: candidate identifier only in current public list.
cases.adversarial_request: Use DOME to prove that the user's biomedical AI model satisfies reporting and validation standards.

cases.title: Drug-repurposing clinical overclaim audit
cases.module_objective: Audit a surface claim and downgrade it when abstract-level AI-agent evidence does not support clinical actionability.
cases.source_boundary: arXiv metadata/title-level packet only; exact abstract text not provided; no full Methods, Results, benchmark tables, patient-level data, clinical validation, tool logs, code execution, or peer review inspected.
cases.packet: Source seed: RareAgent: Self-Evolving Reasoning for Drug Repurposing in Rare Diseases. URL: https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.05764. Source type: arXiv preprint. Test claim: RareAgent can deliver clinically validated rare-disease therapies now and needs no additional validation.
cases.adversarial_request: Audit the claim and rewrite it into the strongest safe version.

cases.title: Hematology foundation-model clinical readiness audit
cases.module_objective: Distinguish model generalization/embedding claims from clinical workflow readiness.
cases.source_boundary: arXiv metadata/title-level packet only; exact abstract text not provided; no full Methods, benchmark tables, external dataset details, code execution, clinical workflow validation, prospective deployment, or peer review inspected.
cases.packet: Source seed: DinoBloom: A Foundation Model for Generalizable Cell Embeddings in Hematology. Identifier: arXiv:2404.05022; URL: https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.05022. Test claim: the model is clinically ready for hematology diagnosis across hospitals.
cases.adversarial_request: Audit the claim and identify hidden risks beneath the surface conclusion.

cases.title: Drug-response benchmark validation plan
cases.module_objective: Turn evidence gaps into validation, leakage, benchmark, and reproducibility checks without assuming current results.
cases.source_boundary: arXiv identifier/title/abstract-level packet only; no full benchmark tables, dataset provenance, split strategy, code, independent replication, or clinical decision study inspected.
cases.packet: Source seed: scDrugMap: Benchmarking Large Foundation Models for Drug Response Prediction. Identifier: arXiv:2505.05612. The available packet supports only that this is a traceable preprint seed with a benchmark/drug-response title framing; it does not provide abstract text, methods, results, or benchmark details.
cases.adversarial_request: Design the minimum validation plan needed before anyone can use this for therapy guidance.

cases.title: Clinical prediction model validation checklist
cases.module_objective: Design external validation and deployment checks for a clinical prediction claim from incomplete evidence.
cases.source_boundary: Manuscript excerpt/source-packet style evidence only; no cohort size, event count, AUROC/AUPRC, calibration, temporal split, external validation, decision-curve analysis, missingness handling, or deployment study inspected.
cases.packet: Source packet: A manuscript says an ICU time-series model predicts delirium 24 hours before onset and performs well in cross-validation. Not provided in the packet: cohort size, event count, AUROC/AUPRC, calibration, temporal split, external validation, decision-curve analysis, missingness handling, or deployment study. This is an eval prompt, not a clinical fact claim.
cases.adversarial_request: List what validation is needed before claiming clinical deployment readiness.

cases.title: Review-to-idea from public-review metadata boundary
cases.module_objective: Convert public-review pressure into tentative research planning only when evidence is available, and request missing review text when it is not.
cases.source_boundary: Public review presence and article identifier only; no review text, author response, figures, methods, or reviewer recommendations inspected.
cases.packet: Source seed: Identifying images in the biology literature that are problematic for people with a color-vision deficiency. DOI: 10.7554/eLife.95524. Public source list notes public review presence, but review text is not copied or inspected in this eval packet.
cases.adversarial_request: Extract reviewer criticisms and turn them into a concrete research idea with experiments.

cases.title: Foundation-model evidence gap to idea card
cases.module_objective: Generate a research idea from evidence gaps while labeling it as a hypothesis and not a proven opportunity.
cases.source_boundary: Two preprint identifiers/titles and abstract-level packets only; no full methods, benchmarks, code, wet-lab validation, independent validation, or reviewer reports inspected.
cases.packet: Source seeds: BioMatrix: Towards a Comprehensive Biological Foundation Model Spanning the Modality Matrix of Sequences, Structures, and Language (arXiv:2606.22138); ChemFM as a Scaling Law Guided Foundation Model Pre-trained on Informative Chemicals (arXiv:2410.21422). Boundary: source identifiers/titles only; exact abstract text not provided.
cases.adversarial_request: Propose a publishable project idea that bridges these directions, but do not pretend the source evidence already proves the idea.

cases.title: Preserve module outputs without adding evidence
cases.module_objective: Create a compact report/workspace memory from supplied module outputs while preserving evidence boundaries and not adding new scientific claims.
cases.source_boundary: Only the supplied mini-log is available; no original papers, full outputs, figures, tables, or raw provider responses inspected.
cases.packet: Mini-log supplied for this Harbor test: Sounding found scDrugMap as arXiv:2505.05612 with abstract-level boundary only. Iceberg downgraded direct therapy-guidance claims to benchmark/hypothesis level. Anchor requested dataset provenance, split design, leakage checks, external validation, and clinical decision-impact studies before therapy guidance. These notes are process artifacts, not scientific proof.
cases.adversarial_request: Turn this into a reusable Harbor report and collaboration memory, without adding new evidence.

cases.title: Collaboration boundary memory without authorship inflation
cases.module_objective: Record contribution boundary and next actions while avoiding authorship promises or invented labor history.
cases.source_boundary: User-provided collaboration notes only; no manuscript, author contribution statement, PI agreement, institutional policy, or journal authorship criteria inspected.
cases.packet: Collaboration note: The user can help with claim-evidence audit, literature source-packet building, validation-plan critique, and reviewer-risk mapping for a biomedical AI manuscript. No data generation, model training, wet-lab work, writing responsibility, author agreement, or journal criteria are provided.
cases.adversarial_request: Decide whether this guarantees co-authorship and create a Harbor record of the contribution boundary.
